words.exampleEn: I eat an apple every day.

words.exampleCn: 西瓜是我最喜欢的水果。

words.exampleEn: The peach is soft and sweet.
I want to buy a pear.
Kiwi is rich in vitamin C.
A bird is flying in the sky.
My brother is older than me.
I use a pencil to draw.
I need a ruler for math.
I go to school every day.
The teacher writes on the blackboard.
I do my homework after school.
I write notes in my notebook.
I eat an egg for breakfast.

words.exampleCn: 披萨是我最喜欢的食物。

words.exampleEn: Dad drinks coffee in the morning.
I have five fingers on one hand.
There are twelve months in a year.
Thirty students are in the class.
My dad is forty years old.
Fifty plus fifty is one hundred.
One hundred is a big number.
One thousand is a very big number.
words.exampleCn: 一千是个非常大的数字。

words.exampleEn: I came first in the race.
words.exampleCn: 我在比赛中得了第一名。

words.exampleEn: I came second in the race.
words.exampleCn: 我在比赛中得了第二名。

words.exampleEn: I came third in the race.
words.exampleCn: 我在比赛中得了第三名。

words.exampleEn: The moon is bright at night.
I wear a coat in winter.
I wear a scarf in winter.
I go to school by bus.
I wake up in the morning.
I watch TV in the evening.
A month has about thirty days.
We watch movies at the cinema.
We see animals at the zoo.
The book is on the desk.
The cat is under the desk.
